title: Can't pass static array to SystemVerilog function.
body:
I can't seem to pass an array to a _SystemVerilog_ function.
The following code (`tmpdbg.sv`):

```systemverilog
01 module foo;
02     logic [7:0] y[0:3], i;
03     
04     function logic [7:0] bar(input [7:0] x[]);
05 	return(x[1] + 1'b1);
06     endfunction // bar
07 
08    initial begin
09 	for(i=0; i<4; i=i+1)
10           y[i] = i;
11 	i = bar(y);
12 	$display("i = %h", i);
13     end
14     
15 endmodule // foo
```

yields the following:

```
$ iverilog -g2012 tmpdbg.sv
tmpdbg.sv:11: sorry: Net y expects 1, but got 0.
tmpdbg.sv:11: error: The expression 'y' cannot be implicitly cast to the target type.
2 error(s) during elaboration.
```
